rationale: Section 11.14 governs exemptions for tangible personal property not producing income. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Section 11.13(b); no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of all tangible personal property, other than manufactured homes, that the person owns and that is not held or used for production of income.
_note: Rule text concerns tangible personal property exemptions, not homestead exemptions; no conflict with proposed §11.13(b) change.
